body_txt: On a Scale from One to Ten , this trope gets a rating of Subversion . Basically, Off the Scale applied to reviews: the movie/video game/whatever has made such an impact on the reviewer that they are willing to break the usual rules of classification of their medium to rate it. The reviewer may consider the work a Dethroning Moment of Suck , Crowning Moment of Awesome , or even Headscratching Moment of "Huh?". There are six categories:  May appear as part of a Critic Breakdown . Compare Readings Are Off the Scale , for when this is done with things other than reviews, or F-- . Some forms of rating-breaking can involve Grade System Snark .
